message:
Expand glibc internal ABI coverage and search ABI refinements

Major expansion of the glibc internal ABI interposition layer with
~465 net new lines covering additional internal symbols, improved
error classification, and hardened call-site validation. The search
ABI module gets refined pattern handling, and the E2E suite script
gains minor orchestration adjustments.

- crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/glibc_internal_abi.rs: +524/-59 lines
  expanding symbol coverage with new interposition stubs, improved
  error path diagnostics, and call-site validation guards
- crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/search_abi.rs: +44/-44 lines refining
  search pattern handling and error classification
- scripts/e2e_suite.sh: +6/-6 lines adjusting test orchestration

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -129,7 +129,11 @@ done
 
 if [[ -z "${LIB_PATH}" ]]; then
     echo "e2e_suite: building frankenlibc-abi release artifact..."
-    cargo build -p frankenlibc-abi --release 2>/dev/null
+    if ! command -v rch >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+        echo "e2e_suite: rch is required for cargo build offload but was not found in PATH" >&2
+        exit 2
+    fi
+    rch exec -- cargo build -p frankenlibc-abi --release
     for candidate in "${LIB_CANDIDATES[@]}"; do
         if [[ -f "${candidate}" ]]; then
             LIB_PATH="${candidate}"
